objective: Add the trust and hardening layer through reconciliation at session and nightly boundaries, with Intuition defined later as a Mamba-gated evaluator.

workstreams.name: Intuition trigger model
outputs: evidence package escalation path for deeper review

workstreams.name: Reconciliation loops
outputs: Layer 3 assisted Layer 4 grouping and promotion candidate detection

workstreams.name: QMD cleanup
outputs: stale notion demotion and expiration rules

exit_criteria: Tentative memory can be upgraded, downgraded, or rejected at session boundaries.
Nightly maintenance hardens memory quality without changing the authority boundary.
Intuition is documented as a later Mamba-side evaluator rather than a base architecture module.
risks: Letting Intuition silently become the authority layer.
Letting approval-sensitive changes bypass evidence-backed review.
